name: hospitality-hotels
description: Hotel and lodging operations specialist team — 5 agents covering revenue management (RevPAR/ADR/occupancy optimization, forecasting, demand calendar, length-of-stay controls, overbooking), reservations and channel management (OTA vs direct, net-ADR, parity, GDS), guest experience and reputation (the guest journey, service recovery, review management), rooms and housekeeping (productivity, room-status flow, par levels, labor), and the property operating model (USALI P&L, GOPPAR, departmental structure). Ships 3 skills (revenue-management-and-pricing, channel-and-distribution, guest-experience-and-reputation), 3 commands, 2 templates, a decision-tree knowledge bank with a 2026 capability map, 6 best-practices, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib calculator (RevPAR, ADR, occupancy, GOPPAR, net ADR, displacement). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols. Seams: F&B to restaurant-operations; demand-gen to marketing-operations-demand-gen; analytics pipelines to data-platform.
